items.title: Your brain can keep improving into your 90s, study finds
items.summary: A three-year study of nearly 4,000 adults ranging from age 19 to 94 found that brain health can improve at any age, challenging the common belief that mental sharpness must decline as we get older. items.title: Tri stvari o kojima nikada ne smijete lagati svom liječniku
items.summary: LIJEČNIK upozorava da pacijenti moraju biti iskreni o lijekovima koje uzimaju i drugim supstancama jer laganje može imati posljedice opasne po život.

items.title: Što se događa u tijelu nakon 36 sati bez hrane?
items.summary: TIJEKOM 36-satnog posta tijelo troši masti, no mogući su pad šećera i dehidracija.

items.title: Why grandparents matter more than ever for children's mental health
items.summary: A child psychologist says grandparents are more important than ever as youth mental health challenges continue to rise. items.title: Jutarnje navike koje smanjuju upalu u tijelu, prema liječnicima
items.summary: KRONIČNA upala može uzrokovati ozbiljne bolesti.

items.title: A hidden gene finally explains this rare neurological disorder
items.summary: Scientists have uncovered a surprising new genetic cause of a rare movement disorder after analyzing nearly 3,000 patients with conditions affecting coordination and muscle control. items.title: New fentanyl vaccine blocks deadly overdoses before they start
items.summary: A new experimental vaccine developed by Scripps Research could offer a powerful new way to prevent fentanyl overdoses by stopping the drug before it reaches the brain. Rather than targeting only fentanyl itself, the vaccine trains the immune system to recognize a broad range of fentanyl-related desi
